data.description:
## Context
The review gates expose real configuration — risk posture, chunking, budget caps, per-criterion advisory-vs-
blocking, and a global enable/disable kill-switch. A project needs a coherent way to read, set, and validate
that config rather than hand-editing scattered keys. (Spun out of `5fd2` as a separate epic; was follow-on F5.)

## Success Criteria
- A single, validated configuration surface for the review gates with sensible shipped defaults.
- A tool/UX to view and set it (per-criterion posture, chunking, budgets, the enable/disable switch) with
  clear precedence and validation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] A validated config schema covering risk posture, chunking, budget caps, per-criterion blocking, and the global enable/disable.
- [ ] A CLI/MCP surface to read/set/validate the config with shipped defaults.
- [ ] Invalid config is a located error, not a silent no-op.
data.title: Review-gate project configuration tool + UX (risk posture, chunking, budgets, per-criterion blocking, enable/disable)
